name: Archer
long_description:
Archer is the AI business bank that gives companies AI agents capable of spending, moving, and managing money on their behalf.

Businesses use Archer to deploy agents with budgets, permissions, and financial controls that can automatically take action when important events occur.

Our flagship use case is rewards. Companies use Archer to automatically send personalized gifts, food, merchandise, experiences, and other rewards across onboarding, referrals, sales, customer success, partnerships, and employee milestones.

We believe rewards are just the beginning. The same infrastructure that allows agents to purchase and send rewards today will allow businesses to automate incentives, payroll, invoice payments, commissions, treasury management, revenue routing, vendor payments, and every other financial workflow inside their company. As agents gain more context from CRMs, product data, Slack, Linear, Notion, internal systems, and APIs, they become capable of understanding what is happening across a business and taking financial action automatically.

Our vision is simple: businesses won't tell employees how to move money. They'll tell agents what they want to accomplish. Agents will handle the work. Archer will moves the money.
one_liner: The AI Business Bank. Let Agents Move Your Money.
